package.inclusions_text: L1: Standard inclusions - Doctor's fee, OT charges, Anasthetic Charges, Drugs, Investigations, Professional charges, Room rents, Nursing & administrative charges | L2: Implants - IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers | L3: Special Investigations - Assays, high end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans,etc. | L4: Modalities of treatment - Laproscopy/abdominal/vaginal/etc.
package.exclusions_text: No package-specific excluded components in JSON; shared GIPSA terms and non-admissible expense rules apply.
package.inclusions_text_clean:
- Doctor's Fees
- OT & Procedure Charges
- Anaesthesia Charges
- Pharmacy
- Investigations
- Professional Charges
- Room Rent
- Nursing & Administrative Charges
- Implants: IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers
- Special Investigations: Assays, high-end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans, etc.
- Modalities of Treatment: Laparoscopy, abdominal, vaginal, etc.
package.exclusions_text_clean: - No package-specific exclusions are listed; general insurance policy terms and non-admissible expense rules apply.
package.inclusions_display: L1: Standard inclusions - Doctor's fee, OT charges, Anasthetic Charges, Drugs, Investigations, Professional charges, Room rents, Nursing & administrative charges | L2: Implants - IOL, Pacemaker, Ortho prosthesis, Stents, staplers | L3: Special Investigations - Assays, high end hormonal studies, SPECT, A scans,etc. | L4: Modalities of treatment - Laproscopy/abdominal/vaginal/etc.

warnings: Stay defaulted to the package master's duration — 3 days for [SGA5166] (pre 0 / post 3); cohort history stays as the reference band.

dnb.note: FC estimate shows only patient_payable. DNB items (patient ₹0) are hidden from FC; billing_disposition + four_value are metadata for the insurer/audit view.

lines.note: 5% GST on the full room rent (₹8500/day > ₹5,000).

tax.note: GST is a separate line, additive to the base estimate (not folded into the parity-pinned total).
